ground_truth.title: KALLAX Shelf unit, white, 30 1/8x57 5/8 "
ground_truth.main_content:
KALLAX

Shelf unit, white, 30 1/8x57 5/8 "

Standing or lying -- the KALLAX series adapts to taste, space and budget. Personalize the shelving unit with inserts and boxes to make it suit your needs.

Article Number: 802.758.87

Product details

The simple design with clean lines makes KALLAX flexible and easy to use at home.

Choose whether to place it standing and use it as a shelving unit or lying and use it as a sideboard.

Display your favorite items on the open shelves or add inserts to create a personalized solution with closed storage.

Designer: Tord Björklund

Good to know

This furniture can take a max load of 55 lbs. on the top.

Coordinates well with pieces of furniture in the LACK series that have the same timeless expression and material as KALLAX.

KALLAX underframe sold separately.

Materials and care

Material: Particleboard, Fiberboard, Acrylic paint, Honeycomb structure paper filling (100% recycled), Plastic edging

Care: Wipe clean using a damp cloth and a mild cleaner. Wipe dry with a clean cloth.

Safety and compliance

WARNING! Tipping hazard -- to reduce the risk of this furniture tipping over, it must be securely anchored. Use suitable screws and plugs for your home. If you are uncertain, seek professional advice.

Measurements

Width: 30 1/8 "
Depth: 15 3/8 "
Height: 57 5/8 "
Max load/shelf: 29 lb

Packaging

Width: 16 "
Height: 6 1/2 "
Length: 59 "
Weight: 46 lb 8 oz
Package(s): 1
